subject.name: 10 Lower Spadina (PBR scenario)
notes: SUBJECT TREATED AS PURPOSE-BUILT RENTAL (PBR) per user instruction 2026-06-22 — overrides vipcondos, which lists it as a condo.
All 1,068 verified comps are CONDOS (condos.ca). For a PBR subject these are CROSS-PRODUCT comps: their $/SF must be bridged DOWN to PBR-equivalent by the condo→PBR premium (~10%).
This workbook's recommended $/SF is the CONDO-EQUIVALENT basis (condo comps + new-build premium). PBR-subject achievable rent = condo-equivalent $/SF ÷ (1 + ~10%).

No-cap pull: EVERY in-window leased transaction was pulled from condos.ca (1,877 total Jan-2025→now across the 9 buildings); 1,068 carry a verified exact interior SF and form the comp set; the remaining ~809 (incl. all 230 Quartz/Spectra) had no published registered area and are logged in the verification file.
SF verified this session: condos.ca registered area (sqft*, source Calculated) confirmed equal to the unit page for Concord 929 (888) and Aqua 414 (600).

parking_adj.note: Area parking comps, downtown waterfront: standalone spots ~$200-250/mo; observed with-vs-without-parking rent uplift is modest (most CityPlace/waterfront comps lease w/o parking). Tunable lever; prior model used a near-zero LINEST value. condos.ca, 2026-06-22.

apt_premium.note: No APARTMENT COMP rows in the set (PBR track found only asking-only listings with no verified SF — see notes). Condo→PBR premium for the subject is ~10% (external/prior-model anchor); applied as a DOWNWARD bridge to the condo-equivalent recommendation in the PBR summary, not via this lever.

subject_mix_output.mix_note: Estimated downtown-waterfront program (no published floor plans yet). Supersede with developer suite schedule when released.

subject_mix_manual.source: estimated downtown-waterfront program 2026-06-22 (den-incl 1BR=1B+1+den); supersede with developer suite schedule (authoritative).

subject_premium.source: new-build/lease-up premium fallback; brand-new 2029-30 subject vs comp blend. C4 normally DERIVED off the live PREMIUM BASIS vintage spread (2003-2025); this is the fallback only if the comp set were single-vintage.

other_excluded_prose:
Quartz / Spectra (75-85 Queens Wharf Rd, 2015) — selected as a comp; 230 in-window leases pulled, but condos.ca publishes NO per-unit registered area for this corporation, so 0 cleared the exact-or-blank SF bar this session (Route A vipcondos plan-by-stack not re-run). Excluded from $/SF; recorded in the verification log.
PBR / apartment track (same-product comps for the PBR subject): nearby purpose-built rentals found on rentals.ca — 25 Lower Simcoe St, 30 Grand Trunk Cres, 15 Fort York Blvd, 8 Mercer St, 39 Niagara St, 33 Bay St, 16 Yonge St. All publish ASKING rent only with no verified floor-plan SF, so none cleared the SF bar; excluded from $/SF (asking-only). Listed for the premium-basis discussion only.
Evaluated & excluded (location/vintage): Sugar Wharf (95 Lake Shore E — different micro-market); Lighthouse / Aquabella / Aqualuna (East Bayfront ~2.5 km); Bisha / King Blue / Theatre Park (Entertainment District); older CityPlace (Optima/Apex/Montage/Neo/Luna/Parade/West One/Harbour View — redundant with the CityPlace floor already included via N1|N2 + Library).
